title: Creamy Smoked Spanish Eggs Bake
description: A rich, indulgent take on the humble Spanish tortilla, featuring smoked paprika, chives, and gooey cheese.

ingredients.name: Tandoori-spiced eggs
ingredients.notes: Make your own tandoori spice mix with cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cubed bread and cook, stirring occasionally, until it's lightly toasted and crispy.
In a large bowl, whisk together the creme fraiche, shredded cheese, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked bread to the bowl and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk the tandoori-spiced eggs and add them to the bowl with the bread mixture.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the dish from the oven and sprinkle with chopped chives.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chives are lightly browned.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
